prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为295→261→256→223→229名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），2025年基准约229名。近3年位次在2 23–256区间窄幅波动，表明该校在吉林省物理类录取位次已趋于稳定；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021年39人、2022年37人、2023年37人、2024年37人、2025 年37人；2026年计划增至38人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.7%，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学主榜排名第3名（2021–2026年连 续保持），稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件，但抖音热度为高热 （综合热度377万，排名第14），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度仍高；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有39个A-/A/A+学科，其中计算机科学与技术、软件工程、 控制科学与工程、光学工程、临床医学等均为A+，与物理类招生专业高度匹配，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、电子信息等专业社会热度持续 升温；吉林省2026年普通高考总人数110868人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算约79825人，较2025年物理类80421人略减约596人，竞争略有缓和；省控线数据2026年缺失，未纳入判 断；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，非吉林省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；跨省报考热度受学校层次和地域偏好综合影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高位稳 定、2026年计划小幅扩招、吉林省物理类考生数略有减少、学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年基准229名基础上略有后移（位次数字增 大，竞争略减）；预测最低位次约238名，区间188–288名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 295 → 261 → 256 → 223 → 229, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing, competition intensifying), with a baseline of approximately 229 in 2025. In the past three years, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 223–256 range, indicating that the university's admission rankings in Jilin Province's Physics Category have stabilized. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 39 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 37 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 38, a slight expansion of about 2.7% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (continuously from 2021 to 2026), firmly among the top universities nationwide, strongly attracting candidates. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, but Douyin popularity is high (comprehensive popularity 377 million, ranked 14th), with high exposure on short video platforms, so application attention remains high. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. It has 39 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine, all A+, highly matching the Physics Category admission majors, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continue to heat up socially. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jilin Province is 110,868, with an estimated 79,825 in Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 72%, a slight decrease of about 596 from 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing and not included in judgment. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local university in Jilin Province, with no local enrollment preference. Cross-province application enthusiasm is influenced by a combination of university level and regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as high and stable historical rankings, a slight expansion in the 2026 plan, a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in Jilin Province, a slightly negative university reputation but high Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases, competition slightly decreases) from the 2025 baseline of 229. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 238, with a range of 188–288.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (188–288), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 188), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Chu Kochen Honors College. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 288), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net and strive for Tier 2 majors.
